title: JavaScript Complete Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from absolute beginner to expert — covering the language, the runtime, the browser platform, async, modules, tooling, testing, security, Node.js, TypeScript, design patterns and engine internals.

stages.title: Getting Started
stages.summary: What JavaScript is, where it runs, and how to set up and run code.

stages.title: Variables & Data Types
stages.summary: Declaring variables and the full set of JavaScript data types.

stages.title: Operators & Expressions
stages.summary: Every operator category and how expressions are evaluated.

stages.title: Control Flow
stages.summary: Conditionals, loops and statements that direct program execution.

stages.title: Functions
stages.summary: Defining, calling and composing functions and their parameters.

stages.title: Scope, Closures & Execution Context
stages.summary: How scope, the execution context, this and closures work under the hood.

stages.title: Objects & Object-Oriented JavaScript
stages.summary: Objects, prototypes, classes and object-oriented principles.

stages.title: Arrays, Iterables & Collections
stages.summary: Arrays and their methods, iteration protocols, Maps, Sets and typed arrays.

stages.title: Built-in Objects & Utilities
stages.summary: The standard library: String, Number, Math, Date, JSON, RegExp, Intl and globals.

stages.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
stages.summary: The event loop, callbacks, promises, async/await and scheduling.

stages.title: Functional Programming
stages.summary: Pure functions, immutability, composition and functional concepts.

stages.title: Error Handling & Debugging
stages.summary: Errors, exceptions, custom errors and debugging tools and techniques.

stages.title: Modules & Module Systems
stages.summary: ES Modules, CommonJS, other systems, resolution and module patterns.

stages.title: Advanced Functions & Metaprogramming
stages.summary: Iterators, generators, symbols, Proxy, Reflect and metaprogramming.

stages.title: The DOM
stages.summary: Selecting, traversing, manipulating and styling the document.

stages.title: Events
stages.summary: Event handling, propagation, delegation and custom events.

stages.title: Browser & Web APIs
stages.summary: The window/BOM, observers, web components, workers and platform APIs.

stages.title: Network & Communication
stages.summary: HTTP, fetch, CORS, real-time communication and network patterns.

stages.title: Client-Side Storage
stages.summary: Web Storage, cookies, IndexedDB, the Cache API and storage best practices.

stages.title: Memory Management & Performance
stages.summary: Memory model, garbage collection, leaks, profiling and optimization.

stages.title: Modern JavaScript (ESNext)
stages.summary: ECMAScript features by version, from ES2015 to the latest proposals.

stages.title: Tooling & Ecosystem
stages.summary: Package managers, bundlers, transpilers, linters, CI/CD and dev workflow.

stages.title: Testing
stages.summary: Unit, integration and E2E testing, mocking, coverage and best practices.

stages.title: Security
stages.summary: Common vulnerabilities, CSP, auth, secure communication and best practices.

stages.title: Design Patterns & Architecture
stages.summary: Design principles, GoF patterns, JS-specific patterns and architecture.

stages.title: JavaScript Engine Internals & Expert Topics
stages.summary: How engines work: parsing, JIT, memory, the spec, Wasm and mastery.

stages.title: Enterprise Development & Enablement
stages.summary: Strategy, governance, platform and enablement for delivering JavaScript applications at enterprise scale.

nodes.title: Enterprise JavaScript Strategy & Operating Model
nodes.description: Strategy, operating model and JavaScript center of excellence.

nodes.title: Discovery & Requirements Engineering
nodes.description: Use case discovery, business case and requirements engineering for JavaScript applications.

nodes.title: Solution Architecture Process
nodes.description: Architecture decisions, design reviews and reference blueprints for JavaScript applications.

nodes.title: Engineering Standards & Quality
nodes.description: Coding standards, peer review, definition of done and quality gates.

nodes.title: Developer Platform & Paved Roads
nodes.description: Internal developer platform, golden paths and shared SDKs for JavaScript applications teams.

nodes.title: Vendor, Tool & Procurement
nodes.description: Sourcing SaaS, partners and tooling for JavaScript applications through enterprise procurement.

nodes.title: Enterprise Data Governance
nodes.description: Data classification, residency and stewardship for JavaScript applications.

nodes.title: Enterprise Risk & Compliance Program
nodes.description: Risk registers, audit readiness and certification programs for JavaScript applications.

nodes.title: Enterprise FinOps Program
nodes.description: FinOps program for JavaScript applications: allocation, forecasting and unit economics.

nodes.title: Program & Portfolio Management
nodes.description: Intake, prioritization and portfolio governance for JavaScript applications.

nodes.title: Change Enablement & Culture
nodes.description: Organizational change, training and adoption of JavaScript practices.

nodes.title: Legal & Ethical Governance
nodes.description: IP, licensing, acceptable use and ethical governance for JavaScript applications.

stages.title: Production-Grade Application Lifecycle
stages.summary: End-to-end delivery lifecycle for production-grade JavaScript applications.

nodes.title: Requirements & Design Phase
nodes.description: Discovery, requirements, design and sign-off for new JavaScript applications features.

nodes.title: Implementation & Build Phase
nodes.description: Build discipline, branching, code ownership and refactoring practice.

nodes.title: Testing & Validation Phase
nodes.description: End-to-end test strategy, performance, security and acceptance programs.

nodes.title: CI/CD & Release Engineering
nodes.description: Pipelines, environment strategy, feature flags and supply-chain security.

nodes.title: Production Readiness & Launch
nodes.description: PRR, launch checklists, gradual rollout and rollback strategy.

nodes.title: Operations & SRE Program
nodes.description: SLOs, error budgets, on-call programs and resilience for JavaScript applications.

nodes.title: Observability Program
nodes.description: Telemetry standards, dashboards, alerting policy and platform ownership.

nodes.title: Incident Management Process
nodes.description: Process for declaring, managing and learning from production incidents.

nodes.title: Support & Maintenance Program
nodes.description: Tiered support, bug triage and ongoing maintenance programs.

nodes.title: Continuous Improvement & Evolution
nodes.description: Feedback loops, technical debt management and evolutionary architecture practice.
